entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A pest insect that causes massive yield loss of various crops globally.

entities.name: YIELD LOSS
entities.description: The reduction in crop productivity caused by pests.

entities.name: BACILLUS THURINGIENSIS
entities.description: A bacterium that codes for the Cry1Ac toxin.

entities.name: CRY1AC
entities.description: A toxin protein effective against Helicoverpa armigera.

entities.name: ALKALINE PHOSPHATASE
entities.description: A homodimeric protein (HaALP) that acts as a putative receptor for Cry1Ac toxin.

entities.name: MIDGUT
entities.description: The part of the Helicoverpa armigera digestive system where the receptor is located.

entities.name: BBMV
entities.description: Brush Border Membrane Vesicles of the target insect gut.

entities.name: ALPHA-GALNAC
entities.description: A residue at the nonreducing terminal of the glycan structure in HaALP that serves as an interactive epitope.

entities.name: LECTIN-LIGAND IMMUNOBOT ASSAY
entities.description: An assay used to detect the presence of R-GalNAc residue in the membrane bound HaALP protein.
